---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve. Is this related to a specific use case?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented. Be specific about:

- What the feature should do
- How it should work
- Any API changes required

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Use Case

Describe a specific use case where this feature would be helpful.

## Checklist

- [ ] This feature would benefit other users
- [ ] I've considered the implementation complexity
- [ ] I've checked for similar existing requests
